text-block-1.title: Training in the Simulation
text-block-1.text:
Sling provides comprehensive testing frameworks including Sling Mocks and the AEM Mocks library. These allow you to test your components, models, and servlets without requiring a full Sling instance.

Just as the training programs in the Matrix simulate reality, these mocks simulate the Sling environment for fast, reliable unit tests.

code-block-1.title: Sling Model Unit Test

text-block-2.title: Testing Capabilities
text-block-2.text:
• Mock ResourceResolver and Resource objects
  • Create test content structure programmatically
  • Register OSGi services and configurations
  • Test Sling Models adaptation
  • Test servlets with mock request/response
  • Integration with JUnit 5
